case_title: JONES, MARVIN W vs. SANDERS, BARBARA B

docket_entries.description: WRONGFUL DISCHARGE, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JONES, MARVIN W AS TO DEFENDANT SANDERS, BARBARA B SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JAN-15-1997 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-18-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       DEC-26-1996

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JAN-15-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON JAN-15-1997, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AND FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH COURT RULES HEARING SET FOR FEB-11-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF FEB-11-1997, CONTINUED TO MAR-13-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO BE FILED. PLAINTIFF WHO WAS PRESENT INDICATED THAT HE INTENDS TO DISMISS CASE. IN WHICH IF HE DOES, HE NEED NOT FILE THE PROOF OF SERVICE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
